name: Yuuki Yoshino
alt_names: Little Red Riding Hood of the Forest of Wild Beasts
description: She is a student at Tōtsuki Culinary Academy and a resident of Polar Star Dormitory. She and the other resident students from his hostel befriended with their fellow roommate Yukihira Soma and also aware to Soma's talent as one of the finest and unique of all. She is also a roommate and friend to her fellow student, Tadokoro Megumi and Sakaki Ryoko.  Yuki is more focus on animal meat as her main cuisine. Unlike Ikumi, the meat master in any meat culinary, Yuki often used the animal hunted game from domestic poultry to any other animals (like rabbits and deer) as her main theme.
